title: PolicyGPT Research Import Bundle v2
description: Machine-ingestible research import bundle for PolicyGPT corpus ingestion. Version 2 adds stable/provisional D-number and G-number support, source-occurrence grouping, program/risk-class/form-family objects, coverage terms, webpage references, change tracking, and markdown sync tracking. Nothing in this bundle is reviewed or customer-citable by default.

research_notes_markdown.description: Optional embedded copy of research_notes.md. Prefer storing generated markdown separately in the vault.

document_number.description: Permanent D-number or research-run provisional D-TEMP number. Do not encode mutable metadata in this value.

group_number.description: Permanent G-number or research-run provisional G-TEMP group number.

webpage_reference.description: A public webpage accepted as source evidence when it lists exclusions, endorsements, limits, sublimits, program terms, risk classes, or policy language without a separate downloadable form.

webpage_extractable.description: True when the document URL is an HTML page that should be snapshotted and parsed.
